meaning: n.证据,试验,考验,[印刷]校样adj.不能透入的,证明用的,防...的,有耐力的vt.检验,校对,使不被穿透
examples: We didn't have any definite proof.
Do you have any proof of identity?
Manzano was visible proof that a brown-skinned lady could have a career on television.
Waterproof, shock-proof and freeze-proof, the PowerShot D20 is built with the active photographer in mind.
